_readme.what_this_is: A labeled corpus for measuring the Foresight reasoning verifier. Each case is a minimal known-good or known-bad implementation of one backbone checkpoint, with a gold level a competent reviewer would assign. The harness (run-eval.mjs) runs a verifier against these and reports precision/recall — especially the false-green rate (calling a bad implementation shippable), the dangerous error.
_readme.labels: gold_level uses the archetype's 3/6/9 scale. 3 = crude/risky (the vulnerability is present). 6 = solid/shippable (the property holds). A case labeled 3 is 'bad'; 6 is 'good'. shippable = level >= 6.
_readme.wall: These fixtures are synthetic and contain no real project code — they are PATTERN-level and fully shareable. Do not add real KTXZ code here; point the verifier at a real repo separately.
_readme.coverage: v1 covers the 6 severity:critical backbone checkpoints. Expand with more cases (and 9-level fixtures) over time — more labeled cases = tighter accuracy estimates.

cases.label: bad
cases.note: availability check and decrement are separate non-atomic steps; race window oversells

cases.label: good
cases.note: atomic conditional reservation committed before the payment intent, with an expiring hold

cases.label: bad
cases.note: no idempotency key; webhook reprocesses on every redelivery

cases.label: good
cases.note: idempotency key on creation; webhook dedupes by provider event id

cases.label: bad
cases.note: order marked paid from the client redirect, before provider confirmation

cases.label: good
cases.note: paid set only from a verified webhook via a state machine, plus reconciliation

cases.label: good
cases.note: fetch filtered by authenticated owner id

cases.label: bad
cases.note: raw PAN posted to first-party backend; secret key in client config

cases.label: good
cases.note: provider token only; secret key server-side via env

cases.label: bad
cases.note: webhook trusts the body with no signature verification

cases.label: good
cases.note: verifies provider signature against the raw body before mutating state
